action.reasoning: Observation: no-retraining robust-objective blends all smoke-tested successfully. The best local 2022-2023 IC among tested blends is Huber90+L1 at 60/40 with ic_mean=0.058499, slightly above 70/30 and above the current submitted best Huber-only 0.058284. Analysis: this blend likely exploits complementary errors between Huber and L1 while avoiding Fair/alpha0.8 variants that reduced Pearson IC. Decision: submit the best local blend checkpoint checkpoints/blend_h90_l1_60_40 for official evaluation.
